examples: Two receptionists sit in the dark, unheated lobby, with matching blankets on their knees.
In the unheated natural area, sagebrush is a source of moisture for an army of thirsty insects.
A silky scarf peeks out from under the collar of her puffy red coat, which keeps her warm in the unheated factory.
He was sleeping on an army cot in an unheated storage room above the football offices.
Poorly-cooked food brings stomach bugs, and unheated homes mean coughs, colds and worse.
